Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}There was a program on TV the other day showing how to make tender chicken breasts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Slice against the grain, marinate it in sauce, and then cook gently at a low temperature...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I'm gonna reclaim my pride today! Just you wait![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I'll make it so good you'll be asking for seconds![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 6 25 25}Come on, have a little faith! I did some serious research, y'know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}I'll show you what I'm really made of. Just forget about last time, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 6 25 25}Hey, that's just mean. But I guess after what happened last time, I can't really blame you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}That's why I'm gonna go all out today. I'll prove that I've learned from my research.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}So, we have to wash our hands first, and then... {f 4 1}-kun, you're in charge of the rice and veggies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I made chicken sauté with Yukari...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}It's so tender and juicy... Way better than last time![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}See!? This is what I'm capable of! I knew I could do it if I tried.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Hehe, I can tell you like it too, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 13 7 1 2}That look on your face says it all! I couldn't help but laugh when you started wolfing it down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Anyway, let's eat up! We still have cleaning to do after this.[n]{f 1 1}
